stories.headline: DeepSeek just made its cheapest prices permanent
stories.blurb: The Chinese AI startup is keeping its V4-Pro model at 75% off the original launch price — so what was a temporary developer deal is now the standard rate. That means API calls stay a quarter of what they cost when the model first shipped.
stories.why_it_matters: Pricing pressure on frontier models just became structural, not promotional.
stories.original_headline: DeepSeek To Make Permanent 75% Discount on Flagship AI Model

stories.headline: Google's Mac app is getting a voice assistant and an agent this summer
stories.blurb: The Gemini Mac app will add two new features: 'Spark,' an agent that can act on your behalf, and voice control so you can talk to it hands-free. Google previewed both at I/O 2026 and says they'll ship sometime this summer.
stories.why_it_matters: Gemini is catching up to ChatGPT's desktop features while adding agent capabilities
stories.original_headline: Gemini app for Mac adding ‘Spark’ agent and voice control this summer

stories.headline: Cursor now works inside Jira tickets
stories.blurb: Anysphere just shipped Cursor directly into Jira, so you can use AI code editing without leaving your project management tool. Write, debug, and generate code in ticket descriptions, comments, or wherever you're tracking work.
stories.why_it_matters: Engineers can now prototype fixes or write code snippets without context-switching to their IDE.

stories.headline: AI cuts years off the hunt for brain disease drugs
stories.blurb: Researchers used machine learning to screen thousands of existing compounds for their ability to cross the blood-brain barrier and target motor neuron disease. The system identified promising candidates in weeks instead of years, focusing on drugs already approved for other uses that could be repurposed as affordable treatments for conditions like MND and Alzheimer's.
stories.why_it_matters: Repurposing existing drugs could get treatments to patients faster and cheaper than developing new ones from scratch.
stories.original_headline: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions

try_this_prompt.title: The ghost deadline
try_this_prompt.prompt: I'm about to paste something I wrote that has no real deadline. Pretend it's due in 48 hours and a smart person is waiting. Cut everything that's hedging, every sentence that's just throat-clearing, and show me what's left. Then tell me if the idea still stands.
try_this_prompt.tool_hint: When you've been polishing something forever and need to just ship it.

daily_question: What's one product feature you'd ship faster if an AI agent could write your Jira tickets?
